stemHtml: The duration of civil twilight is the time…

options.a: needed by the Sun to move from the apparent height of 0° to the apparent height of 6°.
options.b: between sunset and when the centre of the Sun is 6° below the celestial horizon.
options.c: between sunset and when the centre of the Sun is 12° below the celestial horizon.
options.d: agreed by the international aeronautical authorities, which is 12 minutes.
